description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build x86 Linux Wheels (ROCm) that triggers on pull requests, pushes to specific branches (nightly, main, and release candidate branches), and workflow dispatches. The workflow generates a build matrix for Linux wheel packages with ROCm enabled, then uses this matrix to build and publish wheels for the pytorch/FBGEMM repository to the nightly channel, handling concurrency and cancellation of in-progress jobs.
